title: Types and theories of pain
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Health — acute/chronic pain, gate control theory, and biopsychosocial models.
learningObjectives: Distinguish acute, chronic, and neuropathic pain.
Outline biological and psychological pain theories.
Evaluate biopsychosocial model of pain experience.

simpleExplanation.title: More than just nerves firing
simpleExplanation.summary: Pain involves tissue damage signals filtered by the spinal cord 'gate' and shaped by emotions and culture — chronic pain persists without ongoing injury.
steps: Acute — warning signal, resolves with healing.
Gate control — large fibres close gate.

sections.content: **Pain theories** (3.3.1) opens 3.3. **Gate control theory** is essential — diagram the mechanism.
